[Mini Event Notice]

The "Balancing Schale's Books with the General Student Council" Mini Event is back!
Earn enhancement materials and tons of Credits!

🗓️Schedule: 4/16 (Tue) After Maintenance – 4/30 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
